title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited:
Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
